title: Kari Oquinn
compiled_truth: Kari Oquinn is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-07 to 2002-02-13), Kari Oquinn sent 9 and received 35 emails, totalling 44 interactions.
